results.title: Jordan slams Iranian attacks on Kuwait, UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman
results.description: AMMAN : Jordan on Sunday condemned Iran's blatant attacks against Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, Qatar and Oman, calling them a flagrant violation of their sovereignty...

results.title: Pope: May the winds of war not extinguish hope and return to dialogue
results.description: After praying the Angelus in Piazza della Libertà in Castel Gandolfo, Pope Leo XIV turned his thoughts to the renewed conflict in the Middle East and the crisis in Ukraine, urging a return to diplomatic solutions. On Sea Sunday, he also expressed his closeness to all seafarers and port workers, whose working conditions have been made more difficult by military tensions. Finally, he recalled the traditional Marian pilgrimage of the Polish faithful to Jasna Góra. Read all

results.title: Home Q&A: If I move house, can I apply for another SEAI grant?
results.description: The same SEAI grant cannot be applied for twice for the same property

results.title: Bank of England confirms 750,000 households to lose £170 a month
results.description: Millions face higher mortgage bills when they renew after pressure linked to the Iran war, the Bank of England has warned.

results.title: Govinda Responds to Viral Videos Involving Wife Sunita Ahuja
results.description: Actor Govinda has responded to the recent viral videos of his wife, Sunita Ahuja, where she appears to use inappropriate language towards him. In a candid conversation, he expressed surprise at the clips but emphasized that he holds no anger, viewing such incidents as part of their personal life. Govinda reassured friends who reached out to him, stating there was no cause for concern. His comments have sparked varied reactions on social media, with some praising his composure while others share their opinions on the situation. As of now, no further official statements have been made by the couple.

results.title: No Thromde election in Gelephu, says ECB
results.description: While residents of Thimphu and Phuentsholing prepare to vote for their Thrompon and thromde representatives this week, people in Gelephu will not go to the polls. The Election Commission of Bhutan (ECB) says the Gelephu Mindfulness City Authority (GMCA) has taken over responsibilities previously carried out by the thromde administration. For years, Gelephu residents relied [...] The post No Thromde election in Gelephu, says ECB appeared first on BBSCL .

results.title: RSS expresses 'grief' over donation theft in Ayodhya Ram temple
results.description: Ayodhya Ram Temple: The RSS expressed grief over alleged irregularities in donation counting and said it was confident the SIT probe and police investigation would reach a decisive conclusion. Eight people have been arrested so far.

results.title: Former skipper Knight to retire from England women's duty after Lord's Test
results.description: LONDON: Heather Knight, England’s 2017 World Cup-winning captain and the most capped women’s player in England history, announced Saturday she will retire from international cricket following the end of the ongoing Test match against India at Lord’s.

results.description: Ajax have stepped up their summer recruitment by opening negotiations for Marcos Leonardo, while the Dutch giants continue their interest in Morocco star Azzedine Ounahi following his impressive World Cup campaign.

results.title: Dangerous heat continues as Saharan dust limits storm chances
results.description: Expect another dangerously hot Sunday with heat index values between 105 and 110 degrees. Saharan dust will limit storm development, although a few afternoon storms remain possible inland and across the Treasure Coast.

results.title: Ayodhya Ram temple trust to define CEO’s powers: Nripendra Mishra
results.description: Ram Temple Construction Committee Chairman Nripendra Mishra said the Ayodhya temple trust will decide the powers and responsibilities of its first CEO. He said the CEO will oversee financial management and devotee services while functioning without government interference under the trust's supervision

results.title: Extended service hours at Mangaluru Head Post Office from July 13
